0.name: Ms. Barbara
0.text: This is the earliest you've been, sweetheart.

2.name: Colin
2.text: Not really, but it has gotten more bearable.

4.name: Ms. Barbara
4.text: Science Month is almost over, and with that comes the Science Fair.

5.name: Ms. Barbara
5.text: Students will be preparing their booths for the exhibit today.

5.5.name: Colin
5.5.text: Oh, right. Perry did mention we have to get ours set up today, too.

6.name: Ms. Barbara
6.text: I wonder if you could help me clear out the cafeteria today?

7.name: Ms. Barbara
7.text: You only need to load the plates into the cart and get the chairs out.

8.name: Ms. Barbara
8.text: The staff can handle the tables once they're free.

8.5.name: Ms. Barbara
8.5.text: I can't really leave the kitchen after.
